title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at ECIL South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at ECIL South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
ECIL South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ECIL South Asia Partners:
ECIL South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL South Asia Partners!
